response.justification: Bogdan brings extensive software engineering experience and a strong technical foundation, including cloud technologies and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure. While he demonstrates technical leadership and an entrepreneurial spirit, his resume lacks explicit experience in defining AI product strategy at a director level, building AI-powered products, or advising strategic customers on AI adoption, which are central requirements for this Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role.
strengths: Extensive 17+ years of software engineering experience, meeting minimum requirements.
Proven experience with cloud technologies (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) and a broad tech stack.
Entrepreneurial background (Founder of GISCollective) and demonstrated technical leadership through workshops and mentoring.
concerns: Limited explicit experience in AI product strategy and building AI-powered products, beyond infrastructure for AI agents.
Lack of clear director-level strategic influence or experience advising strategic customers/partners on AI adoption.
No advanced degree in an AI-related field, which is a preferred qualification for the role's AI focus.
